content.en:
Another period of time passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already penetrated very deep into the endless space-time line, and the endless space-time line here was constantly shrinking, and the space-time particle power contained in it was extremely terrifying, even if he was advancing very slowly.

"My strength is still too weak, if it is the ultimate ancient demon, I will definitely be able to continue to move forward and explore, but I can't withstand the power of time and space here. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He wasn't going to move on, and if he forced his way forward, he would be crushed by the power of the endless spaceline.

So, he began to explore other places and did not go deeper.

Another long time passed, and Ye Tian explored everywhere in the endless space-time line.

this day.

Ye Tian once again made a new breakthrough in creating the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, and he successfully created the Fourth Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane.

This Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane is a Time Sword Cover created based on the Ultimate Rules of the Time Extreme Path and the Ultimate Rules of the Sword Extreme Path!

The Time Sword Cover is mainly defensive, and what is increased is the ability to save life, after all, he already has an attack method like the Demon Blade, and what he wants is naturally to increase the means of life-saving.

The more life-saving means he has, the less likely he will be killed, and there is even hope that he will save his life when he faces the ultimate ancient demon.

And over the years, with the help of some resources he found, he gradually cultivated the Ten Thousand Law Form Secret Method, the Arrow Golden Body Form Secret Method, the Arrow Arm Form Secret Method, and the Sixth Form of the Time and Space Form Secret Method to the consummation realm one by one.

At this time, he also felt that the increase in his strength from these form secret methods was almost not much, and even if he created some form secret methods, it would be difficult for his own strength to improve much.

In terms of cultivation, he has also reached the middle stage of the peak ancient demon level realm, and his strength has improved a lot.

He felt that with his own strength, he should be almost invincible in the peak ancient demon-level realm, but he was not really invincible, and he hadn't fought against other famous peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, so he couldn't be sure.

......

this day.

Somewhere in the endless spaceline.

Extremely rich energy appeared out of thin air, and these energies gradually combined into a corner of a palace in a clever combination.

Then, countless energies continued to converge and eventually turned into a complete palace.

And the next moment, the projection of the Ultimate Ancient Demon came here, and then absorbed countless energies and turned into an avatar.

These Ultimate Ancient Demons came from the three hundred and sixty-five main divisions, but they were gathered here at this moment.

Suddenly.

The arrival of an ultimate ancient demon attracted the respect of many ancient demon-level powerhouses, and they all respectfully shouted: "I've seen Duowei Ancient Demon.~!"

The Dovi Ancient Demon nodded slightly, then sat down, and a throne was automatically condensed underneath.

The other Ultimate Ancient Demons also sat down, and when the other Ultimate Ancient Demons came, they would start the meeting again.

After a while, the other ultimate ancient demons came.

"The final meeting has officially begun. "

Dovi said the ancient demon.

As the ultimate ancient demon who has been in retreat and penance, she usually does not appear at all, but this time she participated in the meeting, and the purpose was very simple, that is, the matter was important enough to alarm her.

Wow!

With a wave of his hand, a formation diagram appeared, attracting other ultimate ancient demons.

"This is the ultimate formation that one of the ultimate ancient demons of my clan accidentally obtained, it is a very ancient era, an ultimate ancient demon tried to fuse two space-time bubbles, but this formation is a little incomplete, and it can't really achieve the fusion of two space-time bubbles. And for a long time, I have been studying this ultimate formation, and now it has been perfected. "

Dovigu's Demon Path.

The faces of the other Ultimate Ancient Demons changed slightly, what did they mean by this.

"Dovi Ancient Demon, do you want to make the three hundred and sixty-five main space-time bubbles all converge together, merge with each other, and turn into a large space-time bubble?"

The ancient demon of Aromu asked.

"That's good!" Dovi Ancient Demon said: "Once it is fused into a large space-time bubble, it is very likely that a huge transformation will occur, resulting in the birth of many treasures and resources, and it is even expected that there will be an opportunity for me and others to achieve the ultimate space-time level Ancient Demon." "

However, most of these ultimate ancient demons were not excited.

They felt that their chances of becoming the ultimate ancient demon of the time and space level were extremely low, and it was better to maintain the status quo.

And once these space-time bubbles are fused, even if they really have the opportunity to break through the space-time level ultimate ancient demon, that opportunity will inevitably fall into the hands of the Dovi ancient demon.

"Duowei Ancient Demon, you want to use the opportunity of fusion to impact the space-time level ultimate ancient demon, and fusing these space-time bubbles is actually not much good for us!"

An Ultimate Ancient Demon Path.

He was not afraid that he would offend the Dovi Ancient Demon by saying this, and no matter how powerful the Dovi Ancient Demon was, he would not be able to resist a large number of Ultimate Ancient Demons.

Moreover, he also has allies, and he is not afraid of the Dovigu demons at all.

The Dovi Ancient Demon was not angry, but said lightly: "Everyone, don't forget, the final tribulation, once you reach the final tribulation, everyone will die." Do you have a means to save your life now?"

"In the end, it will be doomed!"

The faces of the Ultimate Ancient Demons changed, although it was an incomparably long future, it would still happen eventually, and once that day came, they would all die.

So far, they have not found a way to live, and are actually slowly waiting for death.

Of course, since the future is still too long, there will be many final periods, and perhaps many wars will break out between each other.

Many of them would not survive to that time, but if they did, they would eventually face the ultimate catastrophe.

If it is expected to break through to the space-time level ultimate ancient demon in the future, or if someone breaks through to the space-time level ultimate ancient demon and destroy the final catastrophe (Deqian Zhao)!

It's not impossible!

"I agree!"

Aromu Ancient Demon said.

He is also an extremely powerful Ultimate Ancient Demon, which is indeed inferior to the Dovi Ancient Demon, but it does not mean that he has no hope of breaking through to a space-time level Ultimate Ancient Demon in the future.

And the great opportunity in the future does not necessarily fall on the Dovi Ancient Demon.

So, after thinking about it, he finally decided to agree.

"I agree with Gong too!"

One after another, the Ultimate Ancient Demons spoke.

And some of the Ultimate Ancient Demons who were in the swing, seeing that the other Ultimate Ancient Demons agreed, they also chose to agree.

Seeing that there are more and more Ultimate Ancient Demons who agree, even if the other Ultimate Ancient Demons disagree, they can't affect the final ending, is it possible to just let these space-time bubbles fuse, don't they fuse?

In that case, the benefits will not be in their turn.

"We agree!"

These ultimate ancient demon paths.
